lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: Did you see that traveler give bread to the beggar outside?

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Probably wanted to feel better about himself. That's all charity ever is.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: Or maybe he just saw someone hungry and couldn't ignore it.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Same thing. But... I suppose it doesn't matter why, does it.
